summary: Comprehensive testing of phone screen protector management app with new features: user management, low stock alerts, compatible models search, and OCR integration

critical_bugs.issue: OCR endpoint failing with Gemini API error - model 'gemini-3-flash-preview' not working correctly

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests
minor_issues.impact: Inconsistent HTTP status codes but security works correctly

minor_issues.issue: Low stock aggregation may not be working correctly
minor_issues.impact: Low stock alerts might not trigger properly

ui_bugs.issue: Frequent redirects to login page during testing, possible session timeout issues
ui_bugs.impact: User experience degraded due to frequent re-authentication

integration_issues.issue: Search input not consistently found, may be implementation or selector issue

passed_tests: GET /api/users - Returns all 6 users correctly (admin only)
Frontend Users management page loads and displays users
Frontend Add product page with OCR button and low stock threshold field
Navigation includes Users link for admin users
All required form fields present and working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix OCR endpoint - check Gemini model name and API integration (HIGH priority)
Investigate low stock alert aggregation pipeline to ensure it works correctly
Review session management to prevent frequent login redirects
Verify search input implementation and ensure consistent selector availability
